{"verdict":"approve","summary":"The new `Deck p` definition faithfully formalizes deck transformations as self-homeomorphisms of `E` over an arbitrary map `p : E → X`, and the action/continuity instances match the visible subgroup-action construction. I found no semantic mis-formalization, vacuity, or prerequisite smuggling in the diff.","findings":[]}

verdict_obj.summary: The new `Deck p` definition faithfully formalizes deck transformations as self-homeomorphisms of `E` over an arbitrary map `p : E → X`, and the action/continuity instances match the visible subgroup-action construction. I found no semantic mis-formalization, vacuity, or prerequisite smuggling in the diff.
